title: Diversified subaddress generation from diversifier index
description: Implement diversified_address(index: DiversifierIndex) -> Result<UnifiedAddress> that generates a fresh Sapling + Orchard receiver at the given diversifier index and assembles them into a ZIP-316 UA. This is the core of nie-bgx. The diversifier index from next_diversifier() is passed in — this function is pure (no DB writes). Defensive programming: if the Sapling diversifier at index is invalid (not all 11-byte combinations produce valid Sapling receivers), increment until a valid one is found per ZIP-32 spec, bounded to 256 attempts, return Err on exhaustion. Log only the diversifier index (u128), never any key material. Use a subagent to check the zcash_primitives sapling API for diversified address generation (PaymentAddress::from_diversifier or equivalent).
acceptance_criteria: Test: 1000 consecutive addresses (diversifier 0..999) are all distinct. Test: known diversifier index 0 produces the same default address as get_default_address(). Test: invalid diversifier handling doesn't panic.
close_reason: diversified_address(sapling, orchard, start, network) -> Result<(DiversifierIndex, String)> implemented in unified.rs. Returns found DI so callers can chain calls with found+1. Tests: 1000 chained distinct, index-0 manual assembly, out-of-range returns Err.
